creator: Nakai@Mlab.t.u-tokyo.ac.jp
text:
I have fixed the guavac port in ${PORTSDIR}/lang to follow its latest version.
guavac 0.3 -> guavac 0.3.1
Guavac is the Java compiler/decompiler.

Yukihiro Nakai
----------
diff -ruN guavac.orig/Makefile guavac/Makefile
--- guavac.orig/Makefile	Fri Jun 27 11:04:49 1997
+++ guavac/Makefile	Fri Jun 27 10:45:56 1997
@@ -1,12 +1,12 @@
 # New ports collection makefile for:   guavac
-# Version required:    0.3
+# Version required:    0.3.1
 # Date created:        10 October 1996
 # Whom:                Yukihiro Nakai <Nakai@Mlab.t.u-tokyo.ac.jp>
 #
 # $Id: Makefile,v 1.3 1997/06/12 21:58:45 jdp Exp $
 #
 
-DISTNAME=	guavac-0.3
+DISTNAME=	guavac-0.3.1
 CATEGORIES=	lang
 MASTER_SITES=	ftp://summit.stanford.edu/pub/guavac/ \
 		ftp://ftp.Germany.EU.net/pub/programming/languages/java/guavac/\
diff -ruN guavac.orig/files/md5 guavac/files/md5
--- guavac.orig/files/md5	Fri Jun 27 11:04:49 1997
+++ guavac/files/md5	Fri Jun 27 10:45:59 1997
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (guavac-0.3.tar.gz) = dc3b10cec02c9a9a0940cf3b2b542962
+MD5 (guavac-0.3.1.tar.gz) = c71079037a172aae4c86d499cea23f11
